command.text: declare @unit varchar(33) set @unit = case when @@profile is not null then @@profile else @@unit end select ma_so_thue as companyTaxCode, so_dt as phoneNumber, tk_nh as bankInfoInvoice, case when @@language = 'V' then ten_gd else ten_gd2 end as directorName, case when @@language = 'V' then ten_ktt else ten_ktt2 end as chiefAccountantName, case when @@language = 'V' then ten_tq else ten_tq2 end as cashierName from dmdvcskb where ma_dvcs = @unit and status = '1'

declare @unit varchar(33) set @unit = case when @@profile is not null then @@profile else @@unit end select ma_so_thue as companyTaxCode_v, ma_so_thue as companyTaxCode_e, so_dt as phoneNumber_v, so_dt as phoneNumber_e, tk_nh as bankInfoInvoice_v, tk_nh as bankInfoInvoice_e, ten_gd as directorName_v, ten_gd2 as directorName_e, ten_ktt as chiefAccountantName_v, ten_ktt2 as chiefAccountantName_e, ten_tq as cashierName_v, ten_tq2 as cashierName_e from dmdvcskb where ma_dvcs = @unit and status = '1'
